rulings.Case Title: CAROLYN M SHAW et al VS. RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Administrative Writ
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 20, 2015, line 1. PETITIONERs CAROLYN SHAW and WILLIAM SHAW's Motion For Administrative Writ DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden. The Court finds that the Administrative Law Judge and the Rent Board did not abuse its discretion in determining that 2002 Costa-Hawkins Amendment (CC 1954.52(a)(3)(b)(ii)) applies to the conversion at issue and that petitioners are not "bona fide purchasers for value" within the meaning of the amendment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 490 TANZANITE LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIOMITED LIABILITY VS. PROPARK AMERICA WEST LLC, A CONNECTICUT et al

rulings.Case Title: YOUNG NA VS. SARA HERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And/Or Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 20, 2015, line 13. PLAINTIFF YOUNG NA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR. Motion for Summary Judgment may be made at any time after answer is filed. CCP 1170.7. Motion for Summary Judgment is framed by the pleadings. First Amended Complaint in the operative complaint in this case. No answer was filed to the operative complaint. Plaintiff was granted a leave to file First Amended Complaint per Court's order. Court's order indicated that Defendants shall have 5 days to respond from the service of First Amended Complaint. No proof of service for the First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY & THROUGH ITS VS. SINBAD'S PIER 2, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 20, 2015, line 15. DEFENDANT SINBAD'S PIER 2, INC.'s Motion To Quash DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges the creation and existence of a landlord-tenant relationship. See paragraphs 6(B) AND 6(D). Moving party and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)
